q: Eight people A, B, C, D, E, F, G and H are sitting in a straight line facing north. A is sitting at one end. B is second to the right of A. C is between B and D. E is immediate left of D. Who is sitting at the other end?
DESCRIBE: A at one end, B placed 2nd right of A, chain forms; remaining end position is H.

q: Six persons A, B, C, D, E and F are sitting in a circle facing centre. B is between A and C. D is opposite B. E is to the immediate right of D. Who is to the immediate left of B?
DESCRIBE: In circular arrangement facing centre, left of B comes A.

q: Five friends A, B, C, D and E are sitting in a row facing south. A is at one end. B is to the immediate left of A. C is between B and D. Who sits in the middle?
DESCRIBE: Arrangement leads to C occupying the central position.

q: Eight persons are sitting in a straight line facing north. F is third to the right of A. B is immediate left of F. C is at one end. Who is sitting at the other end?
DESCRIBE: Using relative positioning, B occupies one end opposite to C.

q: Six friends A, B, C, D, E and F are sitting in a circle facing outside. A is second to the left of B. C is opposite A. D is immediate right of C. Who is to the immediate left of B?
DESCRIBE: Facing outside reverses direction logic; D becomes immediate left of B.

q: Seven persons are sitting in a straight line facing north. A is at extreme left. B is third to the right of A. C is between B and D. Who is second to the left of D?
DESCRIBE: After arranging, B is second to the left of D.

q: Eight friends sit in a row facing south. G is at one end. H is third to the left of G. F is immediate right of H. Who is sitting at the other end?
DESCRIBE: Arrangement fixes opposite end as A.

q: Six persons sit in a circle facing centre. A is between B and C. D is opposite A. E is to the immediate right of D. Who is to the immediate left of A?
DESCRIBE: From circular arrangement, B is immediate left of A.

q: Five persons A, B, C, D, E sit in a row facing north. A is to the immediate right of B. C is in the middle. D is at one end. Who is at the other end?
DESCRIBE: After placing middle C and end D, E occupies other end.

q: Eight persons sit in a straight line facing north. E is fourth to the left of A. B is immediate right of E. C is at one end. Who is at the other end?
DESCRIBE: After arrangement, D occupies the opposite end.

q: Seven persons sit in a row facing south. A is second to the left of B. C is immediate right of A. D is at one end. Who is in the middle?
DESCRIBE: After arranging, B occupies middle position.

q: Six persons sit in a circle facing centre. A is opposite B. C is between A and D. E is immediate right of B. Who is to the immediate left of C?
DESCRIBE: Circular arrangement places A immediate left of C.

q: Eight persons sit in a row facing north. A is at extreme right. B is third to the left of A. C is between B and D. Who is at extreme left?
DESCRIBE: After full arrangement, H is at extreme left.

q: Five persons sit in a circle facing centre. A is second to the right of B. C is opposite A. D is immediate left of C. Who is immediate right of B?
DESCRIBE: After arranging, A becomes immediate right of B.

q: Seven persons sit in a straight line facing north. A is in the middle. B is second to the right of A. C is immediate left of A. Who is at one end?
DESCRIBE: Arrangement places B at one end.

q: Six persons sit in a row facing south. A is at extreme left. B is immediate right of A. C is between B and D. Who is at extreme right?
DESCRIBE: After arranging, F occupies extreme right.

q: Eight persons sit in a circle facing centre. A is opposite C. B is between A and D. E is immediate right of B. Who is immediate left of C?
DESCRIBE: After arrangement, D is immediate left of C.

q: Five persons sit in a row facing north. A is second to left of B. C is at one end. D is between A and C. Who is in middle?
DESCRIBE: Final arrangement places D in middle.

q: Seven persons sit in a line facing south. A is at extreme right. B is third to left of A. C is immediate right of B. Who is at extreme left?
DESCRIBE: After arrangement, G is at extreme left.

q: Six persons sit in a circle facing centre. A is between B and C. D is opposite B. E is immediate left of D. Who is immediate right of A?
DESCRIBE: Final circular arrangement gives C immediate right of A.
